name: German Potato Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the mashed potatoes, well-beaten eggs, flour, baking powder, and salt until combined.
2. Add the grated onion to the mixture and stir until evenly incorporated.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the batter into hot cooking oil (about 1/4 inch deep).
4. Cook the pancakes until browned on both sides. This yields approximately 12 (3-inch) cakes.
5. Serve with applesauce.
(Note: Recipe not attributed.)
